title: Template and node types; templates.toml loader
description:
Define the graph-template types and load `.jit/templates.toml`, validated at config load.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] [hard] REGA-01: the template, node, anchor, edge, and transform types compile and round-trip through (de)serialization.
- [ ] [hard] REGA-02: `.jit/templates.toml` loads at config time and an invalid template fails with a clear error.
